sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5760" key="a)mfida/knw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιδάκνω</orth>, <sense id="n5760.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bite all round:</tr_> hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grip close,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.118</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Sil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
